title: AAP compact token protected header (AAP-SPEC section 9.2)
description: The JOSE protected header of every AAP compact token. A v1 header contains exactly alg, typ, kid and no others; a verifier MUST reject unknown header parameters, including crit (AAP-SPEC section 9.2). General-form per-signature protected headers are a different, smaller shape (exactly alg + kid, AAP-SPEC section 9.4) and do not validate against this schema. `alg` names the signature suite from the AAP suite registry (AAP-SPEC section 9.5); v1 registers two suites, EdDSA (Ed25519, RFC 8037) and ML-DSA-65 (FIPS 204; JOSE registration RFC 9964). ML-DSA-44 and ML-DSA-87, though registered for JOSE, are not in the AAP registry. A verifier MUST reject a header whose alg it does not support rather than silently downgrade (AAP-SPEC section 8.2). `typ` is pinned to "JWT" in v1; explicit per-token typing is a v2 negotiation item. `kid` identifies the signing key in the issuer's published key material (Ed25519 keys as OKP JWKs, ML-DSA-65 keys as RFC 9964 AKP JWKs).
